items.description: Aalu (Nepalese Style Potato Salad). Boiled potato, lemon juice, Nepalese herbs & spices marinated.

items.description: Spicy mixture of onion, tomato, shallot, fresh ginger, garlic, coriander, lemon juice, authentic Nepalese spices and mustard oil.

items.description: Spicy mixture of onion, tomato, shallot, fresh ginger, garlic, coriander, lemon juice, authentic Nepalese spices and vegetable oil.

items.description: Spicy mixture of fresh onion, tomato, shallot, ginger, garlic, coriander, lemon juice, authentic Nepalese spices and vegetable oil.

items.description: Bara, aalu bodi tama, salad, yomari, pan fried crunchy beaten rice flex, aalu achar & marinated fried soybean.

items.description: Minced lamb infused with spices and herbs on a skewer.

items.name: Choila
items.description: Charcoal grilled marinated diced fillets tossed on fresh chopped ginger garlic, coriander, Mustard oil with roasted homemade masala, pan fried crunchy beaten rice flex, salad & marinated fried soybean aalu bodi tama.

items.name: Sekuwa
items.description: Marinated in ginger, garlic & Nepalese spices boneless chicken fillet or goat or pork roasted on clay oven, pan fried crunchy beaten rice flex, salad, aalu achar & marinated fried soybean.

items.description: Boiled goat giblets pan fried with onion & homemade masala. Pan fried crunchy beaten rice flex, salad, aalu achar & marinated fried soybean.

items.description: Sukuti, chiura, salad, pan fried crunchy beaten rice flex.

items.description: Chicken tikka, lamb seek kebab, lollipop with mint chutney.
